summary: Seasoned manufacturing operations leader with 14 years of experience in automotive and industrial manufacturing. Currently serving as Plant Director at Continental AG, overseeing a 650-employee facility producing electronic brake control units. Achieved OEE improvement from 72% to 86% through lean manufacturing programs and MES deployment. Six Sigma Black Belt with proven track record managing EUR 15M capital investments and EUR 95M operating budgets.

experience.title: Plant Director — Electronic Brake Systems
bullets: Directed operations of 650-employee manufacturing plant producing electronic brake control units for BMW, VW, and Stellantis
Drove Overall Equipment Effectiveness (OEE) from 72% to 86% through lean manufacturing initiatives and Total Productive Maintenance programs
Managed EUR 95M annual operating budget and spearheaded EUR 15M capital investment project for new SMT production line
Led deployment of Manufacturing Execution System (MES) integrated with SAP PP, achieving 18% reduction in scrap rates
Maintained IATF 16949 recertification with zero major non-conformances across 3 consecutive audit cycles

experience.title: Senior Production Manager — Powertrain Components
bullets: Managed 3 production lines with 280 employees manufacturing fuel injection systems and turbocharger components
Executed Six Sigma improvement projects resulting in EUR 2.4M in annual cost savings
Introduced predictive maintenance program that reduced unplanned downtime by 32%
Coordinated with R&D on New Product Introduction (NPI) for electrified powertrain components

experience.title: Lean Specialist (promoted from Production Engineer, 2014)
bullets: Promoted from production engineer to lean specialist within industrial automation manufacturing division
Facilitated 25+ Kaizen events and provided lean manufacturing training to 100+ shop floor operators
Supported SAP PP implementation for production planning and shop floor data collection

certifications: Lean Practitioner — SME (Society of Manufacturing Engineers)
